type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Due to low water levels caused by a drought in the North Slave Region a substantial amount of backup diesel generation was required to offsite low production from NTPC’s hydro site. The increase in diesel generation resulted in increased NO2 emission levels.
